cards.title: NHS Maternity Review Reveals Systemic Failures
cards.body: The largest NHS maternity review found babies and mothers died after sustained failings and a toxic workplace culture. The report highlights critical gaps in care that parents need to know about.

cards.title: Families Share Stories from NHS Maternity Scandal
cards.body: Families affected by the largest maternity scandal in NHS history are speaking out about their experiences. Their accounts reveal the real impact of systemic healthcare failures on new parents.

cards.title: Children's Anxiety Management Strategies
cards.body: Parents can help identify the sources of their child's anxiety and manage it effectively. Understanding triggers is the first step toward supporting anxious kids.

cards.title: Managing Worry on Family Holidays
cards.body: A parent's anxiety about worst-case scenarios can overshadow family time, but learning to cope builds resilience. Discovering you can handle real emergencies changes how you parent.

cards.title: Only Children Aren't Weird or Selfish
cards.body: Myths about only children being maladjusted persist despite little evidence. Parents choosing to have one child face unwarranted judgment from society.

cards.title: Grammar School Pressure and Child Potential
cards.body: Parents shouldn't project their own school anxieties onto their children's educational paths. Your bright child needs your support, not expensive tutoring guarantees.

cards.title: Childhood Trauma and Adult Relationships
cards.body: Children raised by narcissistic or avoidant parents often struggle to recognize healthy relationships as adults. Breaking these patterns takes time and conscious effort.

cards.title: Twin Identity Confusion and Dishonesty
cards.body: Persistent fighting between twins often stems from identity confusion rather than genuine conflict. Understanding this root cause helps parents address the real issue.

cards.title: College Orientation Guide for Students
cards.body: College orientation offers crucial opportunities to learn about campus support and resources. Making the most of this time sets students up for success.
